purpose: A text input with a fixed format mask (e.g. phone numbers, credit cards, dates). Guides user input by showing placeholder characters and enforcing the pattern as they type.
whenToUse: Input has a known, fixed format (phone, tax ID, credit card, product code)
You want to prevent invalid characters at input time
The user should see the format they're entering (visual scaffold)
Data must be normalized to a specific format for storage
whenNotToUse: Format is variable or optional — use Input with validation
For free-text or long descriptions — use TextArea
For dates — use DatePicker (better a11y and locale-aware)
For passwords — use Input with type=password
doRules: Show the mask as a placeholder (___-___-____)
Accept paste with normalization (strip separators from pasted text)
dontRules: Do not use for locale-sensitive formats without locale awareness (dates, currency)
Do not require an exact match if the last few characters are optional — use validation
Do not hide the mask on focus — user needs to see the format
Do not use for search — SearchField is the correct control

layoutGuidance.sizing: Min width fits the mask + padding (e.g. 200px for phone)
layoutGuidance.spacing: Standard field spacing (16px between form rows)
layoutGuidance.alignment: Full width in FormElement; hug in HBox

contentGuidance.labelLength: Mask is fixed-width (e.g. 14 chars for phone with separators)

responsiveBehavior.S: Full field width; keyboard may need numeric mode

requirements: Visible label describes the expected format
aria-describedby points to a hint explaining the mask
Screen reader announces the mask on focus
Type-appropriate keyboard on mobile (numeric for phone)
